subcodes.first_line: O Salamander of the divine ignited flame! It is of the very requirements of being a salamander, and among the essential qualities of a fiery bird, to be consumed by flame, and naught else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نار موقده الهیه از مقتضیات سمندری و لوازم طیری ناری احتراقست و هیچ
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
